calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Jul-17-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Lawrence Siracusa for Scott Hodges (Administrator). Chani Zarchi (not an Attorney) on behalf of Congregation Chevra Thilim.

Mr. Siracusa explained that the accrued payment of $39,000.00 (there about) from the CalPERS account for which the Congregation was a beneficiary was deposited after Mr. Weinberger's death and that the Administrator thought it was part of the estate. Mr. Siracusa also stated that the funds have been returned to CalPERS, that CalPERS is to pay the Congregation and that the Congregation needs to pursue it. The Court granted the accounting petition (subject to review of the order).

Judge: John Dearman. Clerk: Rosie Noguera/Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy R. McConico. (Not Reported)

REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (1455 41st Avenue, San Francisco Ca 94122)
Off Calendar Jan-29-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Lawrence Siracusa for Scott Hodges.

The sale was confirmed at $823,490.00.00 based on the terms and conditions as set forth in the report of sale filed December 30, 2013. Bond is waived. The Court granted the Petition to Confirm Sale of Real Property (subject to receipt and review of a revised order).

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy Allen. (Not Reported)
